recommendations.title: Demons 2
recommendations.overview: A group of tenants and visitors are trapped in a 10-story high-rise apartment building infested with demons who proceed to hunt the dwindling humans down.

recommendations.title: A Blade in the Dark
recommendations.overview: Bruno, an up and coming film composer, has been hired to write the score to a new horror movie. After moving into a secluded villa, life begins to imitate art as a vicious killer starts bumping off anyone and everyone who happens to pay him a visit.

recommendations.title: The Cave of the Golden Rose
recommendations.overview: After a queen's tragic death, the king abandons his newborn daughter in a cave, but a witch saves her. Years later, the tomboy princess must confront and ultimately falls in love with the enemy king.

recommendations.title: The Cave of the Golden Rose 3

recommendations.title: Naruto Shippuden the Movie

recommendations.title: Frailty
recommendations.overview: A mysterious man arrives at the offices of an FBI agent and recounts his childhood: how his religious fanatic father received visions telling him to kill people who were in fact "demons."

recommendations.title: Game of Death
recommendations.overview: A martial arts movie star must fake his death to find the people who are trying to kill him.

recommendations.title: Stage Fright
recommendations.overview: A high-end musical theater camp is terrorized by a bloodthirsty killer who hates musical theater.

recommendations.title: The Ouija Experiment 2: Theatre of Death
